title: Qualis: An open-source platform for Q-methodology research
description: Qualis is a self-hosted, open-source web application that integrates the complete Q-methodology workflow — study design, recruitment, online data collection, factor analysis, and export — into a single platform. It supports any device, multilingual studies, and exports to PQMethod, Ken-Q Analysis, and the R qmethod package. Designed for critical Q-methodology practice.
